productName: Super Fog - Fire - Ion - 1g (1pk) - Blue Dream - SAT - Dessert
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Blue Dream's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of berry, blueberry, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
